text: What we saw were fighter aircraft dumping fuel in front of this UAV, and then getting so close to the aircraft that it actually damaged the propeller on the MQ-9. We we assess that it likely caused some damage to the Russian aircraft as well. Because of the damage, we were in a position to have to essentially crash it into the Black Sea. I think this is a provocation. They provoked us with some action, and then they tried to blame us for it. We were in a position to have to essentially crash it into the Black Sea.
